scripts.check: python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v && python3 -m compileall app && node --test tests/frontend.test.mjs tests/frontend_next.test.mjs
scripts.check:next: npm --prefix frontend-next run typecheck && PLATFORM_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8128 npm --prefix frontend-next run build && node tests/next_runtime_smoke.mjs
